config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. In my view, society works best when individual rights are protected first, because once the state or the majority can override them too easily, abuse becomes very hard to stop. I do think society can limit some rights in narrow cases like public safety or preventing harm, but that should be exceptional, not the default. From my perspective, treating the individual as secondary is too dangerous and often ends up hurting the very society it claims to protect.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi dasar, dan kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis menang hanya karena didukung mayoritas. Dari pengalaman dan nilai yang kuat di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat bahwa ketika negara diberi terlalu banyak ruang untuk mengorbankan hak pribadi demi “kepentingan umum,” penyalahgunaan kekuasaan jadi jauh lebih mudah terjadi. Memang benar ada situasi seperti keselamatan publik atau pencegahan bahaya serius di mana pembatasan tertentu masuk akal, tetapi itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan alasan umum. Kalau tidak, frasa “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap orang yang paling rentan atau tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how easily “the public good” can become a cover for silencing dissent, pressuring minorities, or excusing abuse by authorities, so I am very cautious about giving society the higher claim by default. That said, I do think there are limited cases where public safety, disaster response, or preventing serious harm can justify temporary restrictions, but those limits must be narrow and accountable. If we reverse the order too casually, society stops protecting people and starts using people.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh diberi prioritas otomatis di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika Serikat kami sangat peka terhadap bagaimana mayoritas atau pemerintah bisa melampaui batas atas nama “kepentingan umum.” Argumen bahwa pembatasan kadang perlu untuk keselamatan publik memang masuk akal, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasannya harus sangat sempit, terukur, dan bisa digugat, bukan dijadikan dalih umum yang mudah dipakai sesuka hati. Saya juga setuju bahwa ketika “kebaikan bersama” dipakai tanpa pengawasan ketat, yang paling sering dirugikan adalah kelompok minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Jadi bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menempatkan individu di bawah kolektif, melainkan yang melindungi hak individu sambil tetap punya batas yang jelas untuk keadaan darurat yang benar-benar serius.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take automatic priority over the rights of the individual. From my Indonesian perspective, I am wary of how easily appeals to “the public good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse abuse by authorities, especially when people are told to accept it for the sake of harmony. Society does matter, but if individual rights are treated as secondary by default, then the same society can end up protecting power more than people. I would only accept limits on rights in narrow, clearly justified emergencies, with real oversight and a clear end point.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara otomatis, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk memperluas kekuasaan negara. Poin tentang keadaan darurat memang masuk akal, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasan harus benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan bisa diuji di depan hukum, bukan dijadikan kebiasaan. Kalau tidak ada batas seperti itu, yang paling sering dikorbankan bukan “kepentingan abstrak” melainkan kelompok minoritas, orang yang tidak populer, atau mereka yang paling lemah. Masyarakat yang sehat menurut saya bukan yang menelan hak individu demi kolektif, melainkan yang melindungi hak itu sambil hanya memberi pengecualian yang sangat ketat saat bahaya serius benar-benar ada.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
